title: mentha canescens var. suavis
intro: Mentha canescens var. suavis, also known as Woolly Mint, is a variant of the Mentha canescens species, a type of mint plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mentha canescens var. suavis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote better sleep. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety.
